title: Clinic generator installation completed

decision.reason: The note describes a completed handover with attached proof and no active incident conditions.

summary: Backup generator installation completed at North Camp clinic with local sign-off.

canonicalSource.statement: Crew 3 completed installation of the backup generator at the North Camp clinic. Acceptance photos were uploaded, the first fuel test passed, and the local coordinator signed off on the handover.

args: Backup generator installation completed at North Camp clinic with local sign-off.
